characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair. Hair is braided in the first half, loose in the second.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a pink tank top initially, then switches to a plain grey sweatshirt.
characters.demeanor: Confident initially, then eager, engaged, and slightly apologetic when making mistakes.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male, average build, fair complexion, short dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a standard dark blue police or customs officer uniform.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female, fair complexion, red hair tied back. Features are stylized and smooth.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a dark blue police uniform, mimicking Character B.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, helpful, patient, and highly expressive.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, absolutely. [Yes, absolutely.]
Character B says: Prove it. [Prove it.]
Character A says: Um, I'm here to visit my sister in Miami. I have a return ticket. I'm not working, just visiting. [Um, I'm here to visit my sister in Miami. I have a return ticket. I'm not working, just visiting.]
Character B says: Impressive. English इतनी अच्छी कैसे? [Impressive. How is your English so good?]
Character A says: Supernova app से! रोज़ दस मिनट practice करती हूँ, बिल्कुल ऐसे ही real conversations के साथ। Let me show you. [From the Supernova app! I practice for ten minutes daily, with real conversations exactly like this. Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the audience with a high-stakes real-world scenario (airport immigration) where English confidence is crucial.
- Demonstrates the learner's fluent English as the payoff.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, daily habit behind her confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PASSPORT CONTROL
Do you speak English?
Yes, absolutely.
Prove it.
I'm here to visit my sister in Miami.
I have a return ticket, I'm not working, just visiting.
Impressive. English इतनी अच्छी कैसे?
Supernova app से!
रोज़ दस मिनट practice करती हूँ,
बिल्कुल ऐसे ही real conversations के साथ।
Let me show you.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Hello, where are you flying? [Hello, where are you flying?]
Character A says: I fly, uh, London. [I fly, uh, London.]
Character C says: Do you mean "I am flying to London"? [Do you mean "I am flying to London"?]
Character A says: Yes, sorry. I am flying to London. [Yes, sorry. I am flying to London.]
Character C says: Any luggage to check in? [Any luggage to check in?]
Character A says: Mmm, luggage? [Mmm, luggage?]
Character C says: Luggage मतलब सामान। जैसे bags या suitcases जो आप सफर में ले जाते हैं। [Luggage means baggage. Like bags or suitcases you carry while traveling.]
Character A says: Oh, I have one luggage. Sorry, मेरी English इतनी अच्छी नहीं है। [Oh, I have one luggage. Sorry, my English isn't that good.]
Character C says: कोई बात नहीं! You can say "My English isn't that good". वैसे, पिछले महीने आपने कितनी बार English में बात की? [No worries! You can say "My English isn't that good". By the way, how many times did you speak in English last month?]
Character A says: Mmm, actually एक बार भी नहीं। [Mmm, actually not even once.]
Character C says: बिना practice के fluency कैसे आएगी? [How will fluency come without practice?]
Character A says: I not have anyone to practice with. [I not have anyone to practice with.]
Character C says: Supernova है ना! रोज़ मेरे साथ practice करो, बिना किसी डर के। You'll be fluent very soon. [Supernova is here! Practice with me daily, without any fear. You'll be fluent very soon.]
Character A says: That's amazing. मैं आज ही अपनी daily routine में Supernova add कर रही हूँ। [That's amazing. I am adding Supernova to my daily routine today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the actual app experience with the AI tutor correcting mistakes gently, acting like a supportive friend.
- Highlights Supernova's Hindi-medium USP by having the AI explain English vocabulary in Hindi.
- Addresses the core user pain point ('no one to practice with') and provides a clear, encouraging call to action.
